response.overview: Just having graduated high school, 18-year-old Tim is about to settle back into the comfort of his routine and his relationship. Yet, turning his back on the predictable city life awaiting him, the young man decides to leave everything behind and hit the road with his Caravelles and Pioneers caravan. From the hectic backstage of massive concerts to the isolated forests of the France's South, by way of colorful encounters and the first romantic relationships of his youth, Tim will experience an extraordinary, teenage micro-society. Between the raw survival of campsite struggles and the social fervor of collective games pushed to the point of absurdity, each trial will sweep him into a true odyssey, shaping his vision of life, friendship, and the transition into adulthood.
response.tagline: Adulthood can wait. The road won’t, out there, the rules of the city don't apply.
response.title: Azimut
